claim: DSM deterministically renders an anonymized semantic-collision fixture across baseline, pressure, and drift states.
because: The case fixture declares stable nodes, relations, qualifications, and exactly three observation states
The public route renders the fixture without changing the default DSM demonstration
npm test passed the deterministic JavaScript and Python integrity suite
npm run check passed JavaScript syntax, Python compilation/import, SQLite round-trip, mutation boundary, Bridge API, DOM safety, model-swap integrity, and canonical-receipt checks
but: The readings are demonstration proxies, not universal thresholds
The fixture does not decide which speaker is morally or politically correct
DSM does not determine whether a person, institution, or statement is racist
so: Use the case to inspect the missing decision rule; do not treat it as a political verdict or human diagnosis.
